name: focus
description: Launch an isolated container scoped to the current working directory

scripts.test:shell: docker info >/dev/null 2>&1 && docker build -f test/entrypoint/Dockerfile -t focus-entrypoint-test . && docker run --rm focus-entrypoint-test || echo '[test:shell] skipped — Docker not available'
scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:shell
